regulatory_references.name: Balanced Scorecard
regulatory_references.relevance: Strategy execution and performance measurement framework

regulatory_references.name: Blue Ocean Strategy
regulatory_references.relevance: Market creation and strategic differentiation methodology

compliance_patterns.description: Strategy engagements require structured documentation of strategic choices and supporting analysis

evaluator_insights.insight: Strategy RFPs demand thought leadership and original insight, not generic frameworks
evaluator_insights.implication: Proposals must demonstrate sector-specific strategic thinking, not just process descriptions
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Include sector trend analysis and original strategic hypotheses in methodology

evaluator_insights.insight: Evaluators value the caliber and experience of the lead strategist
evaluator_insights.implication: Senior partner or director involvement is expected and must be explicit
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Name the lead strategist with detailed credentials and relevant experience

evaluator_insights.insight: Strategy engagements are judged on the quality of analytical frameworks proposed
evaluator_insights.implication: Generic SWOT/PESTEL alone is insufficient — proprietary or advanced frameworks differentiate
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Propose a tailored analytical framework specific to the client's strategic challenge

methodology_patterns.when_to_use: End-to-end strategy development from diagnosis to execution planning
Market expansion and revenue growth strategy

forbidden_assumptions: Do NOT assume the client lacks a current strategy — position the engagement as strategy refresh or enhancement
Do NOT propose only analysis without actionable recommendations — strategy must lead to implementation
Do NOT assume one strategic framework fits all — tailor the analytical approach to the specific challenge
